ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES user_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal cost of the item (quantity * unit_price - discount + tax) */,
  "ordered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the item has been ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item for shipping */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item for shipping */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the item is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, customer, guest) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the address belongs to */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the address is the default for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the payment method belongs to */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_info" TEXT /* Payment information (e.g., credit card number, expiration date) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for credit cards */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the payment method is the default for the user */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES user_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status update belongs to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the status update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in inventory */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)
